delta_from_prior.note: Second per-chapter convergence pass on EP01. The prior 08:22 run treated '(standard English rendering)' as adequate translator provenance and '(Book of Government)' as adequate hadith attribution; this run applies the spec's strict A1/A3 reads. Five P0 findings (1×A1 hadith citation missing collection+number+narrator; 3×A3 Quran citations missing specific translator vs the book-wide Asad convention used in ch02; 1×CS4 chapter 9,645 words over the extended-band ceiling 9,500 — systemic across all 6 chapters of the book). 1 auto-fix applied (O1 Prophet first-mention expanded from special-char contraction to full English per contract directive). 2 P1 carried (A2 Nahj edition unspecified; B5 em-dash density not safely auto-fixable due to A4 verbatim integrity).
